name: Syrup for Hot or Cold Chocolate Drink
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Artificial Sweetener (equal to 1/2 c plus 2 1/2 tbsp)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the cocoa powder, artificial sweetener, sugar, and hot water.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture reaches boiling point.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the vanilla extract.
5. Allow the syrup to cool before storing it in a jar in the refrigerator.
6. To prepare chocolate drink, add 1-2 tablespoons of syrup per serving to hot or cold milk.
7. This syrup is not suitable as a topping due to its bitter taste when consumed without milk.
Yield: Approximately 12 servings
Serving size: 2 tablespoons
Per Serving:
Calories: 17
Fat: 5 grams
Protein: 1 gram
Carbohydrates: 2 grams
Exchange Type: Free
